Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: QoL Tweaks (Keyboard+Mouse)
Punchline: Keyboard+mouse press mirror, no controller code.
Description: Side-by-side build of QoL Tweaks from the v22 snapshot: the last version before cross-hotbar controller support was added. Mirrors action presses across hotbars for keyboard and mouse only.
Changelog: Fix Cascade and other non-dance presses going to invisible bars. v23-25 skipped the pressed slot and would pulse the first matching duplicate, which could be on a collapsed or hidden hotbar so the user saw nothing. v26 walks bars in order, skips non-visible ones, and pulses the FIRST match including the pressed bar itself. Result: lowest-numbered visible bar with the action pulses, which is usually the pressed bar unless the user has the same action on a lower-numbered hotbar too.
